nodes.label: Never-Block Soft-Warn Philosophy
nodes.rationale: Every rule violation is a dismissible warning citing its source (PHB/TLC); every value overridable, revertible, re-editable; a warnings summary on the overview. Shapes every validation path.

nodes.label: Calculated + Override Dual-Value Model
nodes.rationale: Every stat shows the calculated value and any user override with an asterisk/pencil, undo/revert, Reset All Modifications, and wizard-vs-manual provenance tracking.

nodes.label: Unified Effects Engine (unspecified)
nodes.rationale: Items, feats, intrinsics, species/lineage traits, class features, and conditions all funnel through effects; the doc's Effects sections and Join Tables are empty headers - the biggest gap in the doc.

nodes.label: Combat-Tab Action Aggregation
nodes.rationale: Actions/Bonus/Reactions compiled from spells, rules, items, class abilities, consumables, and feats into collapsible source sections with counters, charges, free-cast-first defaulting, item-charge vs slot toggles, and upcast selection.

nodes.label: Admin-Managed Content (Hasbro-lawyer constraint)
nodes.rationale: No bundled WotC content: all rules content is admin-entered/imported data. Spreadsheet-like CRUD, 4-state visibility lifecycle, 5e.tools import, user-content promotion, 4 admin roles.

nodes.label: Three-Tier Rest System (Short/Long/Session)
nodes.rationale: Confirm-summary screen of individually toggleable refresh actions, ability-swap options, per-session ability restoration, and item recharge logic; Apply Rest executes only chosen steps.

nodes.label: Per-Character Change Log + Admin Log
nodes.rationale: Entries batched per inactivity window; implies an event/action layer under all mutations.

nodes.label: Companion Subsystem
nodes.rationale: Template-driven limited character sheets tied to an owner, embedded stat/combat blocks in the owner's tabs, sheet switching, own mini-inventory, shared rest mechanics; companions do not level/gain XP.

nodes.label: Creation + Leveling Wizards
nodes.rationale: Data-driven level-gated choice prompts (Divine Order etc.) persisting on the character, multi-level level-ups, soft-enforced multiclass prereqs, per-class collapsible feature/spell sections.

nodes.label: Content Visibility States
nodes.rationale: Doc gives three conflicting enums (Public/Locked/Deprecated/Hidden vs Faction Unlocked vs DB 3-value); plan resolves to public|locked|deprecated|hidden.

nodes.label: Aptitudes Tab
nodes.rationale: App-only umbrella term (not standard D&D) covering Feats, Languages, Weapon+Armor proficiencies and masteries, Tools/Instruments, and Intrinsics.

nodes.label: Breaks Tab (rest UI)
nodes.rationale: App tab name for the rest system, including a LevelChange child in the component tree.

nodes.label: Intrinsics
nodes.rationale: Semi-permanent/miscellaneous effects: Supernatural Gifts, curses, abilities, modifications granted over the campaign, plus Lineage traits; companion-only variants exist.

nodes.label: Val'Ruvina
nodes.rationale: A feat grouping category (alongside Origin/General/Fighting Style/Epic Boon) and a world source (Val'Ruvina-specific magic); Val'Ruvian is a language.
